channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Amazon Facilities in Bahrain Hit Again as Iran Follows Through on Threat, Report Says
item.description: Iran had promised to hit American tech companies on April 1st.

item.title: Intuit's AI agents hit 85% repeat usage. The secret was keeping humans involved
item.description: When Intuit shipped AI agents to 3 million customers, 85% came back. The reason, according to the company's EVP and GM: combining AI with human expertise turned out to matter more than anyone expected — not less.Marianna Tessel, the financial software company’s EVP and GM, calls this AI-HI combination a “massive ask” from its customers, noting that it provides another level of confidence and trust. “One of the things we learned that has been fascinating is really the combination of human intelligence and artificial intelligence,” Tessel said in a new VB Beyond the Pilot podcast. “Sometimes it'...

item.title: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse
item.description: Delve faces new allegations that it violated the open source license of its customer, Sim.ai, by taking the customers's tool and passing it off as its own.

item.title: Why the PS6 Handheld Will Matter More Than the PS6
item.description: After the second round of PS5 price hikes, our best hope for an affordable next-gen console may be Sony's rumored PS6 handheld.

item.title: ‘System failure’ paralyzes Baidu robotaxis in China
item.description: Passengers in Baidu's robotaxis were trapped for up to two hours.

item.title: DNA Study Casts Even More Doubt on Shroud of Turin’s True Origin
item.description: The infamous Shroud of Turin has been surrounded by controversy since it first appeared in the historical record.

item.title: Sam Witwer Is Ready for Maul’s Moment
item.description: It was animation that gave Darth Maul a second chance, years after his seeming end in 'The Phantom Menace'. Now, he's starring in his own TV show—and the man behind Maul couldn't be happier.

item.title: A new dating app, Sonder, has a deliberately annoying sign-up process (and it’s working)
item.description: Sonder profiles are completely unstructured, encouraging users to build something that looks like a mood board or a digital collage. Think MySpace rather than LinkedIn.

item.title: Lil Finder Guy is the cutest thing Apple has made in its 50-year history — and it has a secret
item.description: People are going gaga over Apple's Lil Finder Guy, who arrived just in time for Apple's 50th Anniversary, but there's more to him than just a cute face.

item.title: SpaceX files plans for mega IPO that could make Musk the world’s first trillionaire
item.description: Musk is likely to pass the trillion dollar mark because he is already close, with an estimated net worth of $823 million. Elon Musk‘s space exploration company has filed preliminary paperwork to sell shares to the public, according to two sources familiar with the filing, a blockbuster offering that would likely rank as the biggest ever and could make its founder the world’s first trillionaire....

item.title: Startup funding shatters all records in Q1
item.description: The record quarterly fundraise largely fueled four mega-deals into OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, and Waymo. But it also indicates a generally hot market.

item.title: Artemis II launch livestream: Watch the historic NASA launch live
item.description: NASA will attempt to launch the Artemis 2 moon mission on Wednesday, April 1, and viewers at home can watch the countdown live online.

item.title: 'API credentials are widely and publicly exposed on the web': Experts scour 10 million web pages and find a shocking amount of security info just lying around
item.description: Researchers examined millions of webpages and found thousands of exposed API credentials, revealing persistent security gaps across cloud services and development environments.

item.title: Anthropic Can’t Cover Up Its Claude Code Leak Fast Enough
Zach Cregger Recruits Second Zach for His Aunt Gladys Spinoff
item.description: 'Weapons' is officially getting a prequel focused on the character played by Oscar winner Amy Madigan, with Zach Shields coming aboard to co-write the screenplay.

item.title: Samsung’s Best OLED TV Is $300 Off
item.description: The gorgeous Samsung S95F QD-OLED is on super sale ahead of the newest models hitting stores.

item.title: April 2026 full moon tonight: ‘Pink’ moon could rise alongside NASA Artemis II launch. Here’s when to look up
item.description: Today marks a big day here on earth and in space. Today marks a big day here on earth and in space. Not only is April 1 the first day of the month, and April Fools’ Day, it’s also the day Apple was founded 50 years ago, and the same evening Artemis II launches its NASA’s mission to the moon, while April’s full pink moon rises in the night sky.

item.title: If you want a budget TV, this Amazon Fire 4-Series is hard to beat at its record-low price
item.description: For a budget friendly TV, check out the Amazon Fire TV 4-Series 50-inch 4K TV which is even cheaper right now thanks to being on sale at Amazon.
